lines.text: (to the meter) [flatly] Yeah, I see you.
Sixty-two days now to Unity Day, [pause] and the nations of honor get named this coming Friday.
This is a president finishing an argument America started losing back in 1969.
[quietly] Fifty years we kept commies off the Moon. [sarcastic] All they had to do was win a primary.
Please rise for tonight's anthem, [pause] One World Rising, performed by the Children's Harmony Choir.
